results.count: {count, plural, =0 {No jobs} one {# job} other {# jobs}}

empty.title: No results
empty.desc: Try fewer filters or a broader search.

detail.reqExperience: {years, plural, one {# year of experience} other {# years of experience}}

apply.title: Apply to {job}
apply.name: Full name
apply.screening: A few questions from the company
apply.successDesc: The company received your application. Track its status from your account.
apply.error: Couldn't send. Check your details and try again.

account.title: My account
account.completeHint: A complete profile gets more replies from companies.
account.headline: Professional headline
account.emptyApplications: You haven't applied to any jobs yet.
account.emptyAlerts: No alerts. Create one to get matching new jobs.

auth.signinSub: Sign in to track your applications and alerts.
auth.signupTitle: Create your account and find work
auth.signupSub: One profile, all your applications and alerts in one place.
auth.name: Name
auth.perk: With your account you can build your profile with AI in 2 minutes, apply in one tap, and get matching alerts.
auth.terms: By continuing you accept TalentOS's Terms and Privacy Policy.
auth.errGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

assistant.title: Job assistant
assistant.greeting: Hi! I'm your search assistant. Tell me what job you're after in your own words — field, city, salary, work mode — and I'll bring you the best matches. I only search: I never post or share anything.
assistant.empty: I couldn't find jobs for that right now. Try broadening your search.
assistant.error: I couldn't process your search. Please try again.

builder.title: Build your profile with AI
builder.intro: Tell me what you do and I'll build your profile in seconds. You confirm before publishing.
builder.modality: How do you want to work?
builder.pitch: In one line, what makes you great?
builder.pitchPlaceholder: e.g. I design complex flows with research and scalable systems.
builder.cvQuestion: Got a CV? Upload it and I'll read it (PDF)
builder.disclaimer: AI proposes · you confirm and publish
builder.headline: Suggested headline
builder.error: I couldn't generate the profile. Please try again.

employer.jobs: {count, plural, =0 {No openings} one {# opening} other {# openings}}
employer.noJobs: No active openings right now. Create an alert and we'll notify you.
employer.notifying: We'll notify you of new jobs
